scripts.version:alpha: pnpm -r exec pnpm version prerelease --preid alpha --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:beta: pnpm -r exec pnpm version prerelease --preid beta --no-git-tag-version
scripts.release:alpha: pnpm build && pnpm version:alpha && pnpm publish:alpha
scripts.release:beta: pnpm build && pnpm version:beta && pnpm publish:beta
scripts.release: pnpm build && pnpm version:release && pnpm publish:release
